PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.reddit.com/r/democrats/hot.json?limit=5&raw_json=1" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(git commit -q -m 'meme avatars: drop flag/very-new emoji for universal rendering *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Map HUD: steps bubble to right of FP \(matched height\); See Local Players + Show-on-map in a row underneath the party bubble *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Profile page: Stats is now an expandable purple bubble \(matches Challenge/DM\); order Challenge > Direct Message > View on Map > Stats *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add deletion: DM messages + whole conversations; town hall posts \(in feed\) and replies. Profile/hall post delete already existed *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Profile View on Map always shows: bots fall back to home hall, players to clique hall; button disabled only when truly hidden *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'View on Map lands on the bot'\\''s actual marker: shared garrisonPosition helper used by both nearby + profile endpoints \(seed no longer index-dependent\) *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Comrade 3D: oversized bobble head + subtle bobble; show 2D sprite instantly as fallback until the 3D model loads \(fixes '\\''enemy didn'\\''t show up at first'\\''\) *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'PvP rebuilt as boxing: static GUARD stance \(jab frame-0\) + right/left jab only. Tap = right jab, quick 2nd tap = left \(1-2\). Removed kicks/hooks/uppercuts/jumpkick/special. Foe throws jabs only. Hit-reaction + knockback kept *)
